title: Monitor and troubleshoot Windows Server environments
summary: Monitor and troubleshoot Windows Server environments

sections.title: Monitor and troubleshoot Windows Server environments
sections.summary: Monitor and troubleshoot Windows Server environments

lessons.title: Monitor Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines and hybrid instances
lessons.content_md:
Monitor Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines and hybrid instances

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-windows-server-iaas-virtual-machines-hybrid-instances/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines and hybrid instances

lessons.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to monitor your Azure VMs by using Azure Monitor to collect and analyze VM host and client metrics and logs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-azure-vm-using-diagnostic-data/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor

lessons.title: Monitor Windows Server performance
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use a range of Windows Server tools to monitor the operating system and applications on a server computer. You'll also learn to configure your system to optimize efficiency and to troubleshoot problems.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-windows-server-performance/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage and monitor Windows Server event logs
lessons.content_md:
Learn how Event Viewer provides a convenient and accessible location for you to observe events that occur. Access event information quickly and conveniently. Learn how to interpret the data in the event log.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-monitor-event-logs/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage and monitor Windows Server event logs

lessons.title: Implement Windows Server auditing and diagnostics
lessons.content_md:
Learn to audit and diagnose your Windows Server environment for regulatory compliance, user activity, and troubleshooting. Implement security best practices through regular audits of your network environment to gain early warning of potential malicious activity.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-windows-server-auditing-diagnostics/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement Windows Server auditing and diagnostics

lessons.title: Troubleshoot on-premises and hybrid networking
lessons.content_md:
Learn to troubleshoot on-premises connectivity and hybrid network connectivity. Diagnose common issues with DHCP, name resolution, IP configuration, and routing that can cause reliability and connectivity problems in an on-premises and a hybrid environment.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/troubleshoot-premises-hybrid-networking/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Troubleshoot Windows Server Virtual Machines in Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn to troubleshoot configuration issues that affect connectivity to your Azure-hosted Windows Server virtual machines (VMs). Explore approaches to resolve issues with VM startup, extensions, performance, storage, and encryption.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/troubleshoot-windows-server-virtual-machines-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Troubleshoot Windows Server Virtual Machines in Azure

lessons.title: Troubleshoot Active Directory
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to troubleshoot AD DS service failures or degraded performance. Learn how to recover deleted security objects and the AD DS database, and how to troubleshoot hybrid authentication issues.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/troubleshoot-active-directory/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Monitor and troubleshoot Windows Server environments
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Monitor and troubleshoot Windows Server environments**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
